commit_message:
Write documentation for and refactor the notetaking system Write documentation for and refactor the notetaking system This PR will add rustdoc documentation for the note_db module. It also brings a couple of refactorings to the interface of the note database to improve usability.

* The singleton will no longer use a `Option<NoteDB>` but a `NoteDB` directly. The singleton is a thread_local RefCell which only gets initialized on the first call to the note functions (which call [`with`](https://
